words.chinese: 插枪图-在进行工件加工时，机器人的工具在每一个加工点位处都有一个特定的位置和姿态，为了验证工具在这些点位处的干涉情况以及机器人的可达性，通常仿真人员会使用一些辅助手段让焊枪或喷涂枪等工具模型在所有机器人示教点位处显示出来，这个过程就叫做插枪。

words.phonetic: /diː siː ɛs dˈuːəl tʃˈɛk s ˈeɪftiː/； /ɹˈoʊbˌɑt sˈeɪftiː dɪzˈaɪn/； /kjˈuːbɪk ˈɛs/； /sˈeɪftiː zˈoʊn/； /sˈeɪftiː mˈuːv/； /sˈeɪftiː bˈɑks/； /ɹˈoʊbˌɑt sˈeɪftiː/
words.chinese: DCS文档：机器人应用中的一个安全模块，叫DCS模块，通常仿真中用DCS来代表safety file/safety zone，也就是画的安全盒子，DCS文档指的是把这些盒子按照对应的安全距离要求，用PPT汇总。generated from DCS program
words.exampleEn: The technician checked the DCS （dual check safety before the production trial.
words.exampleZh: 技术员在生产试运行前检查了DCS文档：机器人应用中的一个安全模块，叫DCS模块，通常仿真中用DCS来代表safety file/safety zone，也就是画的安全盒子，DCS文档指的是把这些盒子按照对应的安全距离要求，用PPT汇总。
words.audioText: DCS （dual check safety, robot safety design）, cubic S, safety zone, safety move, safety box, robot safety

words.english: The thing with the prox sensor is they have to be really close to the part. And sometimes if you have like a little variation, those sensors can hit the part. With the laser ones, they are really far, so you don't have any kind of isse like hitting the part
words.primaryEnglish: The thing with the prox sensor is they have to be really close to the part. And sometimes if you have like a little variation, those sensors can hit the part. With the laser ones, they are really far, so you don't have any kind of isse like hitting the part
words.phonetic: /ðə θˈɪŋ wˈɪð ðə pɹˈɑːks sˈɛnsɚ ˈɪz ðˈeɪ hˈæv tˈuː bˈiː ɹˈɪliː klˈoʊs tˈuː ðə pˈɑɹt ənd səmtˈaɪmz ˈɪf jˈuː hˈæv lˈaɪk ə lˈɪtəl vˌɛɹiːˈeɪʃən ðˈoʊz sˈɛnsɚz kˈæn hˈɪt ðə pˈɑɹt wˈɪð ðə lˈeɪzɚ wˈʌnz ðˈeɪ ˈɑɹ ɹˈɪliː fˈɑɹ sˈoʊ jˈuː dˈoʊnt hˈæv ˈɛniː kˈaɪnd ˈʌv ˈɪs lˈaɪk hˈɪtɪŋ ðə pˈɑɹt/
words.chinese: 检测工件用光电开关而非接近开关的原因： , , , 接近开关需要离工件很近，有时候会因为一点偏差而撞到工件。 而光电开关离工件远，不会有干涉工件的问题。
words.exampleEn: The thing with the prox sensor is they have to be really close to the part. And sometimes if you have like a little variation, those sensors can hit the part. With the laser ones, they are really far, so you don't have any kind of isse like hitting the part
words.exampleZh: 检测工件用光电开关而非接近开关的原因： , , , 接近开关需要离工件很近，有时候会因为一点偏差而撞到工件。 而光电开关离工件远，不会有干涉工件的问题。
words.audioText: The thing with the prox sensor is they have to be really close to the part. And sometimes if you have like a little variation, those sensors can hit the part. With the laser ones, they are really far, so you don't have any kind of isse like hitting the part

words.english: We need to set clear goals for the team
